transfers.title: Chelsea agree record £117m deal for Villa's Rogers

transfers.title: Chelsea agree £117m deal for Aston Villa's Morgan Rogers - sources
transfers.desc: Chelsea are set to make Morgan Rogers the most expensive player in British history after agreeing a £117 million deal with Aston Villa, sources have told ESPN.

news.title: Spain's final training session before World Cup final cancelled
news.desc: Spain's final session before Sunday's World Cup final has been cancelled due to thunderstorms in New Jersey.
